subject: Pearly -> Abyssal: PR-108 post-push Sonar verify — remote confirmed, gate still ERROR
body: Verification complete. Remote confirmed: local HEAD c6984bc6cb8c6e63925096dfa9a27f089fb371b2 matches origin/feat/mcp-graph-support-foundation exactly. Sonar PR-108 post-push gate is still ERROR. Conditions: new_coverage OK; new_security_hotspots_reviewed OK at 100.0; new_duplicated_lines_density ERROR at 5.9 > 3; new_violations ERROR at 20 > 0. Open issue snapshot now shows 15 OPEN issues, including 5 new watcher-heartbeat.ts S7786 findings from the mega-commit at lines 58, 61, 73, 76, 88; graph-corpus-sdk export/re-export findings; graph-ingest turtle/source-path findings; and the existing eef-evidence-grounded negated-condition finding. Security hotspots are 13 total and all REVIEWED SAFE. Duplication surface still broad: search_duplicated_files reports overall duplication density 12.7 with 59 duplicated files; top Sonar-returned contributors include generated SDK files plus agent-tools bin wrappers/tests and HTTP e2e tests. Net: push is confirmed; Sonar remains blocking, with violations materially reduced from the prior 20-open snapshot to 15 open issues but quality gate still reports new_violations=20 and duplication=5.9. No force/bypass action taken by me.
